message:
fix(trace): evict oldest incomplete traces when complete-trace eviction is insufficient

SymbolTraceCollector::evict_oldest() only evicted complete traces,
so a burst of incomplete traces that never finish could grow the
trace map unboundedly past max_traces. Add a second eviction pass
that removes the oldest incomplete traces when the map is still
over capacity after complete-trace eviction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
